name: Poro
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 14; Episode 8 

Poro is an inhabitant of Orange Town. He tried to convince Boodle not to go back while Buggy was there, but Boodle refuse to listen. After seeing Chou-Chou returning to the surviving inhabitants of Orange Town alone, he organized a mob in order to save Boodle and driving Buggy out of town. But they find Luffy, Zoro and Nami and chase them out instead.    

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
